title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development in Uganda. By analyzing protein binding sites across 15,000 potential targets, they narrowed viable candidates to 15 for validation using only laptop and server infrastructure.
